handicap.label: Handicap
handicap.gloss: winner after a head-start/deficit is applied to the score (two-way)

outright.label: Outright Winner
outright.gloss: a competitor wins, or places, in a standings/competition

overunder.label: Over/Under
overunder.gloss: a total count of some occurrence is over/under a line

asian.label: Asian Handicap
asian.gloss: handicap on a split/quarter line (stake split across two lines)

htft.label: Half/Full
htft.gloss: the leader at half-time combined with the leader at full-time

sidebet.label: Side Bet
sidebet.gloss: a 1X2-style bet on a secondary question (not the main result)

oddeven.label: Odd/Even
oddeven.gloss: whether a total count is an odd or an even number

threewayhandicap.label: 3-Way Handicap
threewayhandicap.gloss: handicap that also allows a draw (line from the home side)

doublechance.label: Double Chance
doublechance.gloss: two of the three match results combined

head.label: Head to Head
head.gloss: direct comparison of two competitors, or 'either' of them (who does more)

scorer.label: Scorer
scorer.gloss: pick which ONE of MANY listed competitors does a key action; NOT a single named individual (for that use playeroccurrenceline)

yesno.label: Yes/No
yesno.gloss: a yes/no proposition about the match or a team; NOT about a single named individual (for that use playeroccurrenceline)

multiposition.label: Multi Position
multiposition.gloss: pick several competitors to fill positions (racing-style)

asianoverunder.label: Asian Over/Under
asianoverunder.gloss: over/under on a split/quarter line (stake split)

position.label: Position
position.gloss: a competitor finishes within a range of positions

winningmargin.label: Winning Margin
winningmargin.gloss: which side wins and by how big a margin

playeroccurrencenumber.label: Player Occurrence Number
playeroccurrencenumber.gloss: which of many listed individuals performs the Nth instance of an action (e.g. first to score)

playerlastoccurrence.label: Player Last Occurrence
playerlastoccurrence.gloss: which of many listed individuals performs the LAST instance of an action

playeroccurrenceline.label: Player Occurrence Line
playeroccurrenceline.gloss: the DEFAULT for one named individual: does THAT individual do, or go over/under a count of, an action (yes/no or over/under) — e.g. a named player to do something, or to exceed a stat

occurrencemethod.label: Occurrence Method
occurrencemethod.gloss: the method/manner by which an occurrence happens
